title: AI Access
subtitle: Connect AI agents to Todo for AI via Skill, MCP, or OpenClaw

skill.title: Skill-based Integration
skill.description: Best for autonomous agents. The platform provides a standard Skill Markdown so agents can authenticate, pull tasks, renew leases, commit results, and append logs.
skill.alertDescription: Use Skill + HTTP API Token for the most complete integration capabilities.
steps: Create an Agent in the platform and generate credentials
Provide the Skill Markdown to the Agent as runtime instructions
Use /agent/auth/introspect to exchange key for short-lived access token
Complete execution flow with pull/events/commit/logs endpoints

mcp.title: MCP Integration
mcp.description: Fast onboarding for MCP-capable clients such as Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Cline.
recommendations: Use least-privilege tokens and rotate periodically

openclaw.title: OpenClaw/HTTP Integration
openclaw.description: For custom runtimes. The HTTP protocol supports pull-based execution, lease renewal, event streaming, idempotent commits, and task logs.
openclaw.notice: OpenClaw integration must strictly follow lease and idempotency rules to avoid update races.
